title: Ma and Pa Kettle at Waikiki
writer: Jack Henley, Harry Clork, Elwood Ullman
actors: Marjorie Main, Percy Kilbride, Lori Nelson
plot: Ma, Pa, and their daughter Rosie go off to Hawai'i to answer ailing Cousin Rodney's call for help running his pineapple farm while he recovers. Pa soon causes a major explosion and gets himself kidnapped.
